title: Core build: scaffold, mock-ChatGPT fixture, browser layer, ask_chatgpt()->text, UC1 acceptance
actual_note: 1.1x estimate, well under 2x flag threshold (240m). ACTUAL derived from .pi-workers/<run>/metadata.txt started_at -> report END_TIMESTAMP / file mtimes — NEVER pi minute self-reports (which were ~5-8x over actual every leg).
objective: uv Python project where ask_chatgpt(prompt, session_identifier, model_settings) -> str works end-to-end vs a loopback mock-ChatGPT fixture; automated acceptance green; ZERO chatgpt.com contact. Real-channel code built but NEVER exercised by tests (operator-runbook-proven later).

what_was_verified.method: best-of-N independent verification panel (3 non-producer lenses over ONE authoritative heavy run) + a remediation leg + an independent re-verify, synthesized by the manager into orchestration/reports/M-002/verify.md. Per agent-rigor.md.
what_was_verified.authoritative_test_output: uv run pytest -q -> 60 passed in 26.41s, zero failures (fresh uv sync --all-groups; re-confirmed by the independent re-verify lens after remediation)
what_was_verified.acceptance: scripts/accept_uc1.sh exit 0; produced tmp/accept-uc1-<ts>/results.json (ephemeral, gitignored) INSPECTED (not exit code alone): overall=pass; CONTINUITY PROVEN (two same-session_identifier calls both used conversation conv-1 holding BOTH user prompts); a model_settings call succeeded; honest-failure step raised LoginRequiredError with an actionable credential-free message. Re-run: bash scripts/accept_uc1.sh
what_was_verified.network_guard: tests/test_network_guard.py deliberate-violation test attempts a non-loopback connect to 93.184.216.34 and asserts the autouse socket guard raises RuntimeError NETWORK BLOCKED; plus Playwright route interception on the mock context. PROVEN to trip.
what_was_verified.d001_conformance: DOM-primary default reader order; one ResponseReader interface (DomReader primary + CopyButtonReader fallback); bounded latest-completed-turn ONLY (no history sweep); fail-closed selectors (SelectorUnavailableError on missing/empty, no cross-channel fallback); adversarial booby-trap NEVER returned across {DOM,copy}x{stable,virtualized}x{boobytrap,copy_mode=wrong}; fail-closed not masked (read_response falls through only on SelectorUnavailableError).
what_was_verified.safety_boundary: chatgpt.com appears ONLY as a src/ constant + inert test literals + an in-suite guard test asserting it never appears in page.url; no test/script navigates the real site or runs channel=real/launch_persistent_context; profile_path treated as opaque (never opened/read/listed/logged); no credential/cookie/token/profile reads anywhere; mock binds 127.0.0.1 ephemeral only.

lens_reports.verify.md: manager synthesis, VERDICT PASS (trust: independent panel)
lens_reports.verify-completeness.md: V3 completeness/spec, V3-VERDICT FAIL -> the one gap (now closed)

note_uncommitted_at_handoff: This handoff + final state + verify*.md panel reports are committed in a final closeout commit after this file is written. NEVER git push (operator pushes).

artifacts_and_trust.path: src/ask_chatgpt/ (errors.py, session_registry.py, selector_map.py, driver.py, readers.py, api.py, __init__, selector_maps/{mock,real}.json)

artifacts_and_trust.note: complete mock per memo-6; loopback ephemeral; scriptable adversarial/failure/streaming/copy/download/fenced/upload modes
scripted UC1 acceptance, raw artifacts to tmp/accept-uc1-<ts>/, exits nonzero on failure
operator-run, all 10 memo-7 unknowns, M-003-consumable results template
BUILT but NEVER executed by any test; correctness vs chatgpt.com is operator-runbook-gated
all-empty -> fails closed; operator fills from the observation runbook

mock_proven_vs_real_unproven.MOCK_PROVEN: UC1 ask_chatgpt()->text end-to-end incl. session continuity, model selection, honest failures (login/session-not-found/model-unavailable/truncated/rate-limited/selector-unavailable + upload/download-unsupported), DOM-primary + copy-fallback reading (incl. clipboard permission-denied), adversarial booby-trap resistance, network egress blocking. All loopback, deterministic.
mock_proven_vs_real_unproven.REAL_SITE_UNPROVEN: Every memo-7 empirical unknown (real chatgpt.com selectors, real download/upload/clipboard/model-selection/session-pinning/completion behavior). channel='real' is exercised ONLY by operator-consented runbook runs, never automated. real.json is an all-empty fail-closed template until the operator resolves the runbook.

blockers: NONE for mission completion. OPERATOR ACTION to unblock real-site + the real half of M-003: run docs/runbooks/observe-chatgpt-unknowns.md (operator-consented, on the operator's own profile) to resolve the 10 empirical unknowns and fill src/ask_chatgpt/selector_maps/real.json. Until then the real channel correctly fails closed.

recommended_next_missions.title: Bundle workflow (UC2): bundle-out (zip files + README/catalog), patch-bundle-back retrieval + apply locally; round-trip diff test
recommended_next_missions.readiness: READY vs mock. M-003 CONSUMES these already-built fixture affordances: download_artifact (real zip + Content-Disposition + missing/delayed/wrong_older/corrupt/truncated/collision/unsupported variants) for the download-capture-primary bundle retrieval; the fenced base64url payload (BEGIN/END_PATCH_BUNDLE + manifest + ZIP_BYTE_COUNT + ZIP_SHA256 + missing_end/bad_hash/changed_and_unchanged/oversized variants) for the checksummed-fenced fallback (D-001 #2); upload_input (<input type=file> + metadata recording + unsupported/reject_size_type/corrupt) for bundle-out. Build the bundle builder/zipper + README/catalog generator, the patch-bundle retriever (download primary + fenced fallback, validate manifest+SHA-256 before apply), and the local apply+diff. Reuse driver/readers. The real download/upload halves stay operator-runbook-gated.
recommended_next_missions.parallelism: Independent of operator runbook; can start now.

recommended_next_missions.title: CLI entry point wrapping ask_chatgpt() (prompt/session/file args, stdout/file output)
recommended_next_missions.readiness: READY; thin wrapper over the public function. Could fold into M-003 or be its own small mission.

complexity_paradigm_signals: FIXTURE-FIRST paradigm worked: building the complete adversarial mock (T3+T4+T4b) before the client (T5+T6+T7) gave every client leg a deterministic, fully-adversarial target, so client tests assert REAL fail-closed/adversarial behavior rather than mocking it. Recommend the same for M-003.

EDITING SERIALIZATION dominated wall-clock (one editor at a time in the shared tree). Only the doc leg (T8) and read-only verify lenses (V2/V3) overlapped other work. The per-leg work was fast (~6-14m each); serialization + manager orchestration overhead is the real cost.
pi MINUTE SELF-ESTIMATES are unusable (~5-8x over actual every leg) — confirmed M-001's lesson. Telemetry derived from metadata.started_at -> report END_TIMESTAMP is reliable; keep doing that.

D-001 DOM-primary (team-lead override of the memo's copy-first rec) is now EMPIRICALLY justified by tests: the default composite returns correct text even when the copy affordance is booby-trapped (copy_mode=wrong) or permission-denied. The empirical revisit trigger (flip order if real-site DOM is flakier) remains a runbook observation.

ONE rework leg (T4c, REWORK-CAUSE spec-gap): the verification panel caught that memo-6 'simulate permission denial' was omitted from the T4 contract's copy_mode list. This is the best-of-N panel earning its cost — a single verifier reasoning over the same checklist might have missed it. Lesson: transcribe memo-6 sub-bullets EXHAUSTIVELY into fixture contracts.
resume_state: orchestration/state/M-002-state.json (status DONE). All deliverables on disk + committed.
